profile.bio: Full-stack engineer passionate about building beautiful, accessible experiences.

evidence.text: I’m a technical lead and polyglot engineer with **10 years’ experience** building **cloud-native platforms**, leading **high-performing teams**, and delivering **AI-driven innovation**. Passionate about solving hard problems, mentoring engineers, and architecting scalable, future-ready systems.
evidence.author: Alexander Bainbridge

evidence.text:
- Parent of two.
- Partner for eleven years.
- Live near my parents after moving around a lot in my 20's.
evidence.author: Unknown

evidence.author: unknown

evidence.text: I worked with Alex for over 4 years and during that time he has grown from a software engineer through to a tech lead. Alex is extremely positive and is a real asset to any team. He has used his excellent interpersonal skills both with UK engineers as well as offshore engineers (India). Alex will try out any new technology and make a success of it. He changed from python to .Net during our time together and most recently has made huge strides with utilising AI as part of engineering practice through using Cursor. Alex's positivity, creativity and personality also provided significant input and support of the Wellness Team at Clinithink as well as the company wide internal comms team. His interpersonal skills also mean that he is interested, and I'd expect would flourish, in line management. We didn't manage to create the opportunity for Alex at Clinithink but I know he'll achieve this somewhere along his journey.
evidence.author: Phil Davies

evidence.text: Joined a small python/react team in a new domain. Python was rusty and I had never worked with django. I quickly got up to speed. Championed build tools, a collection of powershell modules and azure devops templates to facilitate re-use build pipeline tooling. Led a team of offshore engineers to become the bar height of quality within engineering. Demonstrated the value in adding static analysis to build pipelines which was quickly funded and integrated. Built out the first CD pipeline using terraform. cutting QA time from minimum a day to minimum an hour. Heavily contritubed to the tech forum, showcasing learnings, different prototypes and side projects. Led a team using .Net with no useful (10 years of out date).Net experience. We delivered ahead of schedule on Release 1 and did 5 more releases within the following quarter Managed the cultural differences with working with offshore engineers (India). (which was also a first) Made good use of personal development on Friday afternoons to explore technologies even adding back into the product and company with new tools and capabilities. Championed wellbeing and psycological safety by being a founding member of the internal wellbeing team. Worked closely with the agile delivery lead to create high performing teams. Worked closely with product owners to shape a more valuable product. Adapted excellently to an AI-enabled engineer. Implemented internal AI usage tracking and reporting to gain insights. I Steered the use of AI in engineering to be more targeted, an approach that I am continuing to revel in.
evidence.author: Anonymous
